items.title: Rakuten fixes issues twice as fast with Codex
items.content: Rakuten uses Codex, the coding agent from OpenAI, to ship software faster and safer, reducing MTTR 50%, automating CI/CD reviews, and delivering full-stack builds in weeks.
items.contentSnippet: Rakuten uses Codex, the coding agent from OpenAI, to ship software faster and safer, reducing MTTR 50%, automating CI/CD reviews, and delivering full-stack builds in weeks.
items.summary: 日本乐天集团采用OpenAI的Codex编码代理来加速软件开发和部署，成功将平均修复时间（MTTR）缩短50%，实现CI/CD流程自动化，并能在数周内完成全栈应用构建。这一案例展示了AI编码助手在企业级软件开发中的实际应用价值和效率提升潜力。
items.ai_reason: 乐天作为大型企业，成功将OpenAI的Codex编码助手应用于软件开发流程，实现MTTR降低50%、CI/CD自动化、几周内完成全栈构建等实际收益，是有价值的AI工程实践案例，具有一定行业参考意义。

items.title: Designing AI agents to resist prompt injection
items.content: How ChatGPT defends against prompt injection and social engineering by constraining risky actions and protecting sensitive data in agent workflows.
items.contentSnippet: How ChatGPT defends against prompt injection and social engineering by constraining risky actions and protecting sensitive data in agent workflows.
items.summary: 本文探讨了ChatGPT如何通过约束危险行为和保护敏感数据来防御提示注入攻击和社交工程攻击。这是当前AI智能体工作流中的关键安全挑战，涉及数据保护和系统安全设计，对AI开发者和安全研究人员具有重要参考价值。
items.ai_reason: AI安全领域的重要话题，探讨prompt injection防御机制，具有技术深度和实用价值

items.title: Wayfair boosts catalog accuracy and support speed with OpenAI
items.content: Wayfair uses OpenAI models to improve ecommerce support and product catalog accuracy, automating ticket triage and enhancing millions of product attributes at scale.
items.contentSnippet: Wayfair uses OpenAI models to improve ecommerce support and product catalog accuracy, automating ticket triage and enhancing millions of product attributes at scale.
items.summary: Wayfair利用OpenAI模型改进电商客户支持与产品目录准确性，实现工单自动分类和大规模产品属性优化。作为大型企业的AI商业化案例，对电商行业具有一定的参考价值和实践意义。
items.ai_reason: AI在电商领域的实际商业应用案例，有一定技术深度和实用价值，但属于应用层面的增量改进，非底层技术突破

items.title: From model to agent: Equipping the Responses API with a computer environment
items.content: How OpenAI built an agent runtime using the Responses API, shell tool, and hosted containers to run secure, scalable agents with files, tools, and state.
items.contentSnippet: How OpenAI built an agent runtime using the Responses API, shell tool, and hosted containers to run secure, scalable agents with files, tools, and state.
items.summary: 本文介绍OpenAI如何利用Responses API、shell工具和托管容器构建代理运行时，实现安全、可扩展的代理服务。该方案支持文件操作、工具调用和状态管理，为开发者提供了构建AI代理的基础设施参考。
items.ai_reason: OpenAI官方技术分享，介绍了如何使用Responses API、shell工具和托管容器构建代理运行时的技术方案，具有较高的技术深度和实用价值。

items.title: Improving instruction hierarchy in frontier LLMs
items.content: IH-Challenge trains models to prioritize trusted instructions, improving instruction hierarchy, safety steerability, and resistance to prompt injection attacks.
items.contentSnippet: IH-Challenge trains models to prioritize trusted instructions, improving instruction hierarchy, safety steerability, and resistance to prompt injection attacks.
items.summary: IH-Challenge是一种训练方法，旨在让大语言模型优先遵循可信指令，从而改进指令层级结构、提升安全可控性，并增强模型抵抗提示注入攻击的能力。该研究针对LLM安全部署中的关键问题提供了有价值的解决思路。
items.ai_reason: AI安全领域的重要研究方向，涉及指令层级优化和提示注入攻击防护，具有较高的技术价值和实用意义

items.title: OpenAI to acquire Promptfoo
items.content: OpenAI is acquiring Promptfoo, an AI security platform that helps enterprises identify and remediate vulnerabilities in AI systems during development.
items.contentSnippet: OpenAI is acquiring Promptfoo, an AI security platform that helps enterprises identify and remediate vulnerabilities in AI systems during development.
items.summary: OpenAI宣布收购AI安全平台Promptfoo，该公司专注于帮助企业在AI系统开发过程中识别和修复安全漏洞。此次收购将增强OpenAI在AI安全领域的能力，也是其战略布局的重要一步。
items.ai_reason: OpenAI收购AI安全平台Promptfoo，属于AI行业重大商业动态，有助于提升AI系统安全能力，具有较高行业影响力

items.title: Codex Security: now in research preview
items.content: Codex Security is an AI application security agent that analyzes project context to detect, validate, and patch complex vulnerabilities with higher confidence and less noise.
items.contentSnippet: Codex Security is an AI application security agent that analyzes project context to detect, validate, and patch complex vulnerabilities with higher confidence and less noise.
items.summary: Codex Security是OpenAI推出的AI应用安全代理工具，可分析项目上下文来检测、验证和修复复杂漏洞，旨在提高漏洞修复置信度并减少误报。目前处于研究预览阶段，代表了AI在安全领域的一个应用方向。
items.ai_reason: AI安全代理工具的研究预览版本，有一定实用价值和创新性，属于早期产品发布

items.title: Reasoning models struggle to control their chains of thought, and that’s good
items.content: OpenAI introduces CoT-Control and finds reasoning models struggle to control their chains of thought, reinforcing monitorability as an AI safety safeguard.
items.contentSnippet: OpenAI introduces CoT-Control and finds reasoning models struggle to control their chains of thought, reinforcing monitorability as an AI safety safeguard.
items.summary: OpenAI发布了CoT-Control研究，发现推理模型难以完全控制自己的思维链。研究表明这种\
items.ai_reason: OpenAI关于推理模型思维链控制的研究，涉及AI安全监控的重要议题，具有技术深度和实际意义

items.title: Introducing GPT-5.4
items.content: Introducing GPT-5.4, OpenAI’s most most capable and efficient frontier model for professional work, with state-of-the-art coding, computer use, tool search, and 1M-token context.
items.contentSnippet: Introducing GPT-5.4, OpenAI’s most most capable and efficient frontier model for professional work, with state-of-the-art coding, computer use, tool search, and 1M-token context.
items.summary: OpenAI发布GPT-5.4模型，定位为专业工作领域最强大且高效的前沿模型。该模型具备顶尖的编程能力、计算机使用能力、工具搜索功能，并支持100万token上下文长度。这是GPT系列的重要迭代版本。
items.ai_reason: AI领域重要产品发布，包含1M-token上下文等技术创新，虽非突破性进展但具有高技术价值和行业影响力

items.title: Ensuring AI use in education leads to opportunity
items.content: OpenAI shares new tools, certifications, and measurement resources to help schools and universities close AI capability gaps and expand opportunity.
items.contentSnippet: OpenAI shares new tools, certifications, and measurement resources to help schools and universities close AI capability gaps and expand opportunity.
items.summary: OpenAI发布了新工具、认证和测量资源，旨在帮助学校和大学缩小AI能力差距并扩大教育机会。这是针对教育行业的具体应用工具，具有一定的实用价值和行业意义。
items.ai_reason: OpenAI发布教育领域AI工具和资源，对学校和教育机构具有一定实用价值，但属于产品更新而非重大突破

items.title: Introducing ChatGPT for Excel and new financial data integrations
items.content: OpenAI introduces ChatGPT for Excel and new financial app integrations, powered by GPT-5.4 to accelerate modeling, research, and analysis in regulated environments.
items.contentSnippet: OpenAI introduces ChatGPT for Excel and new financial app integrations, powered by GPT-5.4 to accelerate modeling, research, and analysis in regulated environments.
items.summary: OpenAI发布ChatGPT for Excel和新金融数据集成功能，基于GPT-5.4技术，旨在加速金融建模、研究和分析流程，提升受监管环境下的工作效率。
items.ai_reason: AI产品发布，具有实用价值和明确应用场景

items.title: The five AI value models driving business reinvention
items.content: Five AI value models show how leaders can sequence AI from workforce fluency to process reinvention and build durable business advantage.
items.contentSnippet: Five AI value models show how leaders can sequence AI from workforce fluency to process reinvention and build durable business advantage.
items.summary: 文章介绍了五个AI价值模型，阐释领导者如何从员工AI能力培养入手，逐步推进到流程重塑，从而建立持久的商业竞争优势。该内容为AI在企业转型中的应用提供了系统性框架，具有一定的实践指导意义。
items.ai_reason: 关于AI商业价值的深度分析，涵盖五个价值模型，从员工AI能力培养到流程重塑的完整路径，对商业领导者具有实用参考价值，属于高价值技术分析。

items.title: Extending single-minus amplitudes to gravitons
items.content: A new preprint extends single-minus amplitudes to gravitons, with GPT-5.2 Pro helping derive and verify nonzero graviton tree amplitudes in quantum gravity.
items.contentSnippet: A new preprint extends single-minus amplitudes to gravitons, with GPT-5.2 Pro helping derive and verify nonzero graviton tree amplitudes in quantum gravity.
items.summary: 一篇关于量子引力振幅的学术预印本，将单减振幅技术扩展到引力子领域，并利用GPT-5.2 Pro辅助推导和验证非零引力子树振幅。这代表了AI工具在理论物理研究中的应用进展，为量子引力振幅计算提供了新的技术路径。
items.ai_reason: 量子引力振幅的理论研究，涉及将单减振幅技术扩展到引力子，有技术深度和创新性，AI辅助验证是亮点，但突破性程度中等

items.title: Our agreement with the Department of War
items.content: Details on OpenAI’s contract with the Department of War, outlining safety red lines, legal protections, and how AI systems will be deployed in classified environments.
items.contentSnippet: Details on OpenAI’s contract with the Department of War, outlining safety red lines, legal protections, and how AI systems will be deployed in classified environments.
items.summary: OpenAI与美国国防部签订合同，协议内容包括AI系统的安全红线、法律保护措施，以及AI在机密环境中的部署方案。这是AI公司在政府领域的重大合作，代表了AI技术进入政府应用的重要进展，对行业发展和AI治理具有重要参考价值。
items.ai_reason: OpenAI与美国政府机构的重大合作协议，涉及AI在政府/军事领域的实际应用，包含安全红线和法律保护等重要内容，属于高价值的行业动态和技术政策新闻。

items.title: OpenAI and Amazon announce strategic partnership
items.content: OpenAI and Amazon announce a strategic partnership bringing OpenAI’s Frontier platform to AWS, expanding AI infrastructure, custom models, and enterprise AI agents.
items.contentSnippet: OpenAI and Amazon announce a strategic partnership bringing OpenAI’s Frontier platform to AWS, expanding AI infrastructure, custom models, and enterprise AI agents.
items.summary: OpenAI与Amazon宣布达成战略合作，将OpenAI的前沿平台引入AWS云服务。此次合作将扩展AI基础设施，提供定制模型，并推动企业级AI代理的应用。这一强强联合有望加速企业AI技术的落地应用，提升Amazon在AI云服务领域的竞争力，同时为OpenAI带来更广泛的企业市场渠道。
items.ai_reason: OpenAI与Amazon AWS的战略合作是AI行业的重大发布，涉及将OpenAI前沿平台接入AWS云服务，扩展AI基础设施、定制模型和企业AI代理，对企业AI应用具有重要影响。

items.title: Introducing the Stateful Runtime Environment for Agents in Amazon Bedrock
items.content: Stateful Runtime for Agents in Amazon Bedrock brings persistent orchestration, memory, and secure execution to multi-step AI workflows powered by OpenAI.
items.contentSnippet: Stateful Runtime for Agents in Amazon Bedrock brings persistent orchestration, memory, and secure execution to multi-step AI workflows powered by OpenAI.
items.summary: 亚马逊云服务Bedrock平台推出有状态运行时环境，为Agent应用提供持久化编排、内存管理和安全执行能力。该功能针对多步骤AI工作流设计，支持OpenAI模型，有望简化复杂AI应用的开发流程，提升Agent应用的stateful处理能力。
items.ai_reason: AWS Bedrock新增有状态运行时功能，为多步骤AI工作流提供持久编排、内存管理和安全执行，对开发者具有较高实用价值，属于平台功能的重要增量更新。

items.title: Scaling AI for everyone
items.content: Today we’re announcing $110B in new investment at a $730B pre money valuation. This includes $30B from SoftBank, $30B from NVIDIA, and $50B from Amazon.
items.contentSnippet: Today we’re announcing $110B in new investment at a $730B pre money valuation. This includes $30B from SoftBank, $30B from NVIDIA, and $50B from Amazon.

items.ai_reason: AI领域重大商业投资消息，金额巨大且参与方知名，对行业有重要影响，但属于商业公告而非技术分析

items.title: Pacific Northwest National Laboratory and OpenAI partner to accelerate federal permitting
items.content: OpenAI and Pacific Northwest National Laboratory introduce DraftNEPABench, a new benchmark evaluating how AI coding agents can accelerate federal permitting—showing potential to reduce NEPA drafting time by up to 15% and modernize infrastructure reviews.
items.contentSnippet: OpenAI and Pacific Northwest National Laboratory introduce DraftNEPABench, a new benchmark evaluating how AI coding agents can accelerate federal permitting—showing potential to reduce NEPA drafting time by up to 15% and modernize infrastructure reviews.
items.summary: OpenAI与太平洋西北国家实验室合作推出DraftNEPABench基准，用于评估AI编码代理加速联邦许可流程的潜力。该工具针对NEPA（国家环境政策法案）文档起草，测试显示可将NEPA起草时间最多减少15%，有望推动基础设施审查现代化。
items.ai_reason: AI在联邦政府许可流程中的实际应用案例，有具体量化改进（15%时间减少），创新性中等但实用价值较高。

items.title: OpenAI Codex and Figma launch seamless code-to-design experience
items.content: OpenAI and Figma launch a new Codex integration that connects code and design, enabling teams to move between implementation and the Figma canvas to iterate and ship faster.
items.contentSnippet: OpenAI and Figma launch a new Codex integration that connects code and design, enabling teams to move between implementation and the Figma canvas to iterate and ship faster.
items.summary: OpenAI与Figma联合发布Codex新集成，实现代码与设计无缝衔接。开发者和设计师可在实现代码与Figma画布之间自由切换，加快迭代和产品上线速度。这一集成打通了设计与开发工作流，具有较高的实用价值。
items.ai_reason: 重要的AI工具集成产品发布，连接代码与设计工具，提升团队协作效率
